calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Off Calendar

Motion To Set Hearing Date Re: Request For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Robert Havok, Esq. and Jenny Shen, Esq., Appearing for Plaintiff Founders Fund, LLC.
Witness Howard Caro sworn and examinded.

No appearance by defaulted defendant Shirley E. Hornstein.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages $750.00
Prejudgment Interest $7,982,829.64
Costs $720.00
Attorney's Fees $9270.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $10,740.00
Defendant is permanently enjoined from claiming employment or business affiliation with Founders Fund, its partners or employees; Defendant is permanently enjoined from falsely claiming employment or business affiliation with Founders Fund portfolio companies, i.e. companies in which Founders haa an investment.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Continued To Nov-28-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Continued To Oct-17-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
